title: crataegus monogyna f. ferox
intro: Crataegus monogyna f. ferox, also known as the prickly hawthorn, is a subspecies of the common hawthorn tree, characterized by its sharp, thorny branches. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its ability to lower blood pressure, improve cardiovascular health, and reduce inflammation. The health benefits of Crataegus monogyna f. ferox include its potential to reduce the risk of heart disease, improve digestion, and boost the immune system. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, capsules, or tinctures, which are often used to support heart health and reduce symptoms of anxiety and insomnia.
